description: Credit memo with negative total referencing original invoice, including reason for credit
parsed_text:
CREDIT MEMO
Credit Memo #: CM-2025-0317
Date: 2025-06-02
Original Invoice #: INV-2025-2981   Original Invoice Date: 2025-05-05
Vendor: Pinnacle Packaging Solutions LLC
Vendor Tax ID: XX-XXX5502
Vendor Address: 3300 Commerce Court, Memphis, TN 38118
Bill To: Summit Retail Partners
720 Marketplace Drive, Nashville, TN 37201
PO Number: PO-SR-1140
Terms: Net 30   Currency: USD

Reason for Credit: Return of defective merchandise — Batch #B2025-044 failed QC inspection. Customer returned 120 units of corrugate mailer boxes (Item #PKG-0882) found to have incorrect crease scoring causing seal failure. Credit issued per RMA Authorization #RMA-2025-0097.

Credit Line Items:
1. Corrugate Mailer 8x6x4 (PKG-0882), Qty -120 @ $3.85 ea    ($462.00)
2. Restocking Fee Waived (per agreement)                         $0.00

Subtotal:                 ($462.00)
Sales Tax Reversal @ 8%:   ($36.96)
Shipping Credit:           ($18.50)
Total Credit:             ($517.46)

This credit memo will be applied to your next outstanding invoice or remitted via ACH within 15 business days of credit approval.
Credit approved by: J. Harmon, AR Manager
Contact: credits@pinnaclpackaging.com | 901-555-0244
